meta.title: Trampoline Gymnastics Club Management Software in Spain | Zaltyko
meta.description: Manage your federated trampoline club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels (Base to Elite), Tumbling, DMT and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated trampoline club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, official categories, Tumbling, DMT, Synchronized levels and licenses. From Nacional Base to Campeonato de España.

painPoints.generic: Managing Tumbling, DMT and Synchronized gymnasts in spreadsheets is chaos. Tracking difficulty levels and training sessions doesn't exist.
painPoints.specific: Coordinating synchronized routines between gymnasts, managing difficulty score tracking, and renewing licenses for each national competition.
